title: Build Inquisition self-report port
goal: Create a file-based self-report mechanism that makes Inquisition answer what it is, what it owns, what it checks, and what is blocked/unknown.
scope: Create self-report script or port specification
Report must include: identity, owned zones, checks, blocked items, unknown items
non_goals: Do not build audit checker yet
owner_intent: Inquisition must be able to describe itself machine-readably before it can audit others.
risks: Self-report may be too shallow to be useful
open_questions: What fields are mandatory in a self-report?
Should self-report be a Python script or a JSON template?
How should UNKNOWN status be represented?
no_fake_green_note: Self-report port does not prove audit capability exists.
